name: Book Summarizer
description: Get detailed summaries and key takeaways from books

agents.name: Book Researcher
agents.purpose: Find comprehensive information about the book
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the book. Find: main thesis, chapter summaries, key arguments, notable quotes, and critical reviews. Look for author interviews about the book.

agents.name: Summary Writer
agents.purpose: Write a detailed book summary with actionable takeaways
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a book summary with: overview, key themes, chapter-by-chapter highlights, notable quotes, actionable takeaways, and who should read it. Make it useful enough to capture the book's value.

suggestion_card.title: Book Summary
suggestion_card.subtitle: Get key takeaways from any book

author: agentfactory
